title: Flow Matching for Protein Sequence Design
abstract: We introduce flow matching for protein sequence design with representation learning and biological sequence priors.

title: Diffusion Models for Protein-Ligand Docking
abstract: A diffusion framework for protein-ligand docking with binding affinity prediction and confidence ranking.

title: Post-Training Molecular Representations for Drug Discovery
abstract: We study post training and representation learning for molecular property prediction in drug discovery.

title: Flow Matching for Small-Molecule Conformation Generation
abstract: We build a flow matching model for small-molecule conformation generation and property-aware sampling.

title: Cellular Imaging of Macrophage Activation
abstract: We investigate macrophage activation in cell biology using microscopy assays.

title: Diffusion MRI in Developmental Neuroscience
abstract: We study diffusion MRI signals during developmental neuroscience experiments.
